ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "laboratory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory offering the position */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator responsible for the job posting */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position being advertised */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the position */,
  "locations" TEXT /* Locations where the position is available */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job posting (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "required_qualifications" TEXT /* Required qualifications for the job */,
  "desired_skills" TEXT /* Desired skills for the job */,
  "application_procedure" TEXT /* Procedure for applying to the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_laboratory_id FOREIGN KEY ("laboratory_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("laboratory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "laboratory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "laboratory_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research focus of the laboratory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Primary location of the laboratory */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory director */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for laboratory inquiries */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for laboratory inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laboratory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting for which the application is submitted */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted by the applicant */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume submitted by the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator providing the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the applicant (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., principal investigator, HR, evaluator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions about the recruitment process */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interview_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview panel */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting the panel is associated with */,
  "panel_member" TEXT /* Name of the panel member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the panel member in the interview process */,
  "panel_date" TEXT /* Date the interview panel was held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interview_panels_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_posting_categories" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_files_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
